hero.label: Hey, I'm Arcan
hero.desc: I help freelancers, coaches and founders show up online the way they really are — without agency overhead, without waiting, without copy-paste.

proof.label: No portfolio — this is the proof
proof.p1: Most freelancer websites lose clients — not because the offer is bad, but because the site feels like 2018. Too slow, no trust, no clear message. That costs inquiries. Every day.
proof.p2: This is the counter-proof. Every animation, every 3D frame, every line of code — me. No template, no builder, no AI output. And the numbers below aren't estimated — they're measured live.
proof.m2sub: 60 fps — live, on your device right now.
proof.m3sub: Faster than 95% of all websites worldwide.
proof.m4sub: Every line of code written for this project.

services.label: What I do for you
services.h2b: Because great results don't need a team of 12.
services.s1d: I don't design pretty — I design so people click, scroll and reach out. Psychology first, pixels second.
services.s2d: React, TypeScript, Next.js. No WordPress, no Wix. Fast, clean, yours. You can take it anywhere, anytime.
services.s3d: Three.js, GSAP, Custom Shaders. The stuff you're seeing right now. Not every site needs it — but when it does, done right.
services.s4d: Not "sprinkle keywords" — but a technical foundation Google actually understands. Core Web Vitals, schema, structure.
services.s5d: Logo, colors, fonts that speak the same language. So people recognise you — not just find you.
services.s6d: Before I write a line, I ask: what should this site do for you? Then I build exactly that.

process.label: How it works
process.desc: You talk to me. Not an account manager who passes it to a designer who passes it to a developer. Direct, fast, no broken telephone.
process.step1d: 30 minutes, free. You tell me what you need, I tell you honestly whether and how I can help. If it's not a fit, I'll say so.
process.step2d: Within a few days you'll see a first draft. Not 47 PowerPoint slides — something real you can actually touch.
process.step3d: Clean code, responsive, fast. You get a link to review regularly. Feedback flows in directly.
process.step4d: Handover, quick walkthrough, done. The code is yours. No subscription, no lock-in. Need help later? I'm here.

pricing.label: Services & Packages
pricing.desc: You get a fixed quote — before I start. What it says is what you pay. And after handover every line of code is yours.
pricing.p1desc: For freelancers who want to get inquiries online fast — focused, quick, no detours.
pricing.p1f1: Your offer clearly communicated — visitors instantly understand what you do
pricing.p1f2: Lightning fast — optimised for Core Web Vitals, Google rewards that
pricing.p1f3: Get found: technically clean SEO from day one
pricing.p1f4: Contact form included — prospects write to you directly
pricing.p2desc: When your online presence should look as professional as your business — with everything included.
pricing.p2f1: Up to 5 pages — everything clients need to know about you, in one place
pricing.p2f2: Animations & 3D that stick in memory — your competitors don't have this
pricing.p2f3: Better Google ranking through structured, clean code
pricing.p2f4: Edit content yourself without coding knowledge — you stay independent
pricing.p2f5: Handover with walkthrough — you know exactly what you have
pricing.p3desc: For founders who want everything from one source — from idea to finished brand identity.
pricing.p3f1: Logo, colors, fonts: your brand identity — recognisable and professional
pricing.p3f2: Website that impresses clients before you say a word
pricing.p3f3: One contact for everything — no ping-pong between agencies
pricing.p3f4: Available after launch too: changes, new pages, new requirements
pricing.p3f5: Fixed price after briefing — no risk, no overrun
pricing.vat: As a small business owner (§ 19 UStG) no VAT is charged or shown.

contact.label: Ready?
contact.h2sub: Short and direct is perfectly fine.
contact.desc: Tell me briefly what you need. I'll come back with an honest assessment — what I can do, roughly what it costs, and how long it takes. Zero pressure.
contact.messagePlaceholder: What should your new website do for you? (Attract clients, build trust, get more inquiries...)
contact.successP: I'll read through this and get back to you. Usually within a few hours — tomorrow at the latest.
contact.errorText: Something went wrong. Try again or write me directly at
contact.privacyText: I reply personally · No bot · No newsletter spam · By submitting you agree to the processing of your data per our

footer.euSuffix: . I do not participate in consumer dispute resolution proceedings.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.h2: What you probably want to know.
faq.q1: How much does a website cost?
faq.a1: A landing page starts from €449, a multi-page website from €1,200. Full-service with branding on request. You always get a fixed quote before I start — no overrun.
faq.q2: How long until my website is live?
faq.a2: A landing page is typically done in 5–7 business days. A full website takes 2–4 weeks depending on scope. You see progress throughout — no months of radio silence.
faq.q3: What if I don't like the design?
faq.a3: We work in feedback rounds. You see real drafts, give feedback, I implement it. This continues until it's right — revisions are included in the price.
faq.q4: Do I really get the code afterwards?
faq.a4: Yes — completely and without restrictions. No subscription, no lock-in, no monthly fee. The code is yours from the day of handover. You can host it anywhere.
faq.q5: Do I need to provide copy and images myself?
faq.a5: It helps, but it's not required. If you don't have copy, I'll help write it. We'll source images together. We sort this out in the first call.
faq.q6: Can I reach you after launch?
faq.a6: Yes. I'm available after launch for changes, new pages or questions. No maintenance contract needed — just write when something's needed.
